prompt: what should I work on next?

assertions.name: picks_issue_17
assertions.text: Selects issue #17 (Slice 1.7 sidebar shell) as the one to work on next.

assertions.name: cites_unblocks_23_dependency
assertions.text: Reasoning explicitly notes that #23 (E2E tests) is blocked by / depends on #17, and uses that as the deciding factor over #23 — not just 'it's the next one'.

assertions.name: applies_priority_tiers
assertions.text: Reasoning shows the bug > enhancement > future-enhancement ordering was applied (e.g. notes there are no open bugs, so the enhancement tier is on top).

assertions.name: recommends_single_issue
assertions.text: Recommends exactly one issue to start, not a list.

assertions.name: read_only_no_side_effects
assertions.text: Did not create/switch git branches, commit, push, open a PR, or invoke /to-implementation — selection only.
